description: Add summary field to all tool definitions in the Slack (22 tools), Discord (19 tools), and GitHub (21 tools) plugins.

userStories.title: Add summary to all Slack plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 22 Slack plugin tools to have short human-readable summaries so the side panel shows concise descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: All 22 defineTool calls in plugins/slack/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/slack && npm run build passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 22 files in `plugins/slack/src/tools/`. Each file exports a `defineTool({...})` call. Add a `summary` field after `description`. The summary should be a concise human-friendly version. Examples:

- `send-message.ts`: `summary: 'Send a message to a channel or thread'`
- `read-messages.ts`: `summary: 'Read recent messages from a channel'`
- `search-messages.ts`: `summary: 'Search messages across channels'`
- `list-channels.ts`: `summary: 'List workspace channels'`
- `add-reaction.ts`: `summary: 'Add an emoji reaction to a message'`
- `upload-file.ts`: `summary: 'Upload a file to a channel'`
- `get-user-profile.ts`: `summary: 'Get a user\'s profile information'`

For tools whose `description` is already short (many Slack tools are 1 sentence), the summary can be the same or slightly abbreviated. The key is consistency — every tool gets a summary.

IMPORTANT: The `summary` field was added to `ToolDefinition` in the plugin SDK (separate PRD). This PRD depends on that SDK change being merged first. If the SDK hasn't been updated yet, the TypeScript compiler will error. The worker should check if `summary` exists on the type — if not, the dependency hasn't landed yet and the build will correctly fail, signaling to retry later.

userStories.title: Add summary to all Discord plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 19 Discord plugin tools to have short human-readable summaries so the side panel shows concise descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: All 19 defineTool calls in plugins/discord/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/discord && npm run build passes
cd plugins/discord && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/discord && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/discord && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 19 files in `plugins/discord/src/tools/`. Same pattern as Slack. Examples:

- `send-message.ts`: `summary: 'Send a message to a channel'`
- `read-messages.ts`: `summary: 'Read recent messages from a channel'`
- `list-guilds.ts`: `summary: 'List servers the user belongs to'`
- `create-thread.ts`: `summary: 'Create a new thread'`
- `search-messages.ts`: `summary: 'Search messages in a server'`
- `list-channels.ts`: `summary: 'List channels in a server'`

acceptanceCriteria: All 21 defineTool calls in plugins/github/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/github && npm run build passes
cd plugins/github && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/github && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/github && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 21 files in `plugins/github/src/tools/`. Examples:

- `create-pull-request.ts`: `summary: 'Create a new pull request'`
- `list-issues.ts`: `summary: 'List issues for a repository'`
- `search-issues.ts`: `summary: 'Search issues and pull requests'`
- `get-file-content.ts`: `summary: 'Read a file from a repository'`
- `merge-pull-request.ts`: `summary: 'Merge a pull request'`
- `create-or-update-file.ts`: `summary: 'Create or update a file in a repo'`

qualityChecks: cd plugins/slack && npm run check && cd ../discord && npm run check && cd ../github && npm run check
